Uses of Record Class
org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.PojoWalker.Options

Packages that use PojoWalker.Options
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor
CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack
MessagePack Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream
Public low-level token-streaming API (pull parser + push generator) shared by every Juneau format.

  • Uses of PojoWalker.Options in org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream

    Fields in org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream declared as PojoWalker.Options
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final PojoWalker.Options
    PojoWalker.Options.DEFAULT
    Default options: emit nulls, no trimming, no sorting, no bound context (falls back to MarshallingContext.DEFAULT).
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream with parameters of type PojoWalker.Options
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    PojoWalker.walk(TokenWriter w, Object value, PojoWalker.Options options)
    Walks the given value and emits its structure through the given writer using the supplied options.
